company: City Government of Trece Martires – ICT Division
description: Trece Martires City. Cleaned and verified large-scale digital citizen records from post-2004 archives, improving data accuracy and consistency. Supported rollout of a Document Tracking System across multiple departments by assisting in system validation, user onboarding, and issue resolution. Gregorio, Trece Martires City. Processed and encoded government remittances, including SSS, PhilHealth, and Pag-IBIG. Assisted in maintaining system reliability and resolving technical issues in a small business environment.
